title: astragalus winkleri
intro: Astragalus winkleri is a rare, perennial plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to the high-altitude grasslands and alpine meadows of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau in China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects. Traditional Chinese medicine has long recognized Astragalus winkleri for its health benefits, including its ability to enhance immune function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus winkleri is often prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or teas, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
